excerpt.rendered: Sale Hyundai, Gippsland offers a wide selection of new, demo and used Hyundai vehicles, flexible finance options, and genuine servicing under one roof. Visit us today.

content.rendered:
Welcome to Sale Hyundai

Looking for a great deal on a new, demo or quality pre‑owned Hyundai? You’re in the right place. Sale Hyundai serves Sale, Gippsland and surrounding regions with a wide range of vehicles, flexible finance solutions and friendly, no‑fuss customer service.

Our modern showroom and display lot offer a large selection of Hyundai models — from compact cars and SUVs to people movers and commercial vehicles. Whether you’re shopping for your first car or upgrading to something new, we make it easy to browse, test drive and buy.

Why choose Sale Hyundai?

  • New, demo & used cars — a broad inventory to suit many budgets.
  • Flexible finance & insurance — our finance specialists help tailor a plan for you.
  • Genuine after‑sales, service & parts — servicing, maintenance and genuine Hyundai parts available on site.
  • Local family‑owned business — we know Gippsland, and care about our community.
  • Friendly, no‑fuss approach — we aim to make buying a car easy and stress‑free.

Start Your Journey

Explore our current stock, book a test drive, or get an obligation‑free finance quote. Our team at Sale Hyundai is ready to help you find the right vehicle and drive away with confidence.
